message:
🐛 Improve update failure UX: actionable error + retry without refresh (#2042)

- Both checkDeveloperChannel and executeDevReleaseUpdate now broadcast
  status "failed" (not "idle") with an actionable error message telling
  the user to run `git stash` and retry
- Reset triggerGuardRef when update finishes (done/failed) so the
  Update button works again without requiring a page refresh

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
